type.name: type_geo_project
type.wiki:
+section title={{name}} :navtop {{description wikify=true}} +row +col-8 :heading Sites {{map listentries="true" entry="child:type:type_map_folder" orderby=name}} :heading Contents {{tabletree message="" simple="false" #maxHeight="500px" showSize=false orderby=entryorder_up ascending=true}} -col +col-4 +center {{image inherited="false" showCaption=true multiples=true popup=true message="" width="80%" useThumbnail="true" }} -center :vspace 1em {{properties message="" inherited="true" metadata.types="content.license" includeTitle=false}} {{properties message="" inherited="true" metadata.types="project_pi" includeTitle=true}} -center -col -row :vspace 1em ---- :vspace 1em :heading Search Project {{display_entrylist startWithAny=true showAncestor=false ancestor=this metadataTypes="" entryTypes="type_core_coreimage,type_core_log,type_core_las,type_core_image,type_core_xrf,type_geo_lithology,type_core_fieldplot,type_core_wcl,type_core_dlis" orderByTypes="name,relevant,createdate,date,size" displayTypes="list,map,images" includeNonImages=false }}
:heading Project Information {{information showDetails="true" showTitle="false" details="true"}} -section
